[CI Build/Linux Build (BINRELOC=no)-1 ]   | 		       -size -10000000c -exec grep 'GNU geany' \
[CI Build/Linux Build (BINRELOC=no)-1 ]   | 		       /dev/null '{}' ';' 2>/dev/null; \
[CI Build/Linux Build (BINRELOC=no)-1 ]   |        else \
[CI Build/Linux Build (BINRELOC=no)-1 ]   | 	 LC_ALL=C grep 'GNU geany' ../../../* 2>/dev/null; \
[CI Build/Linux Build (BINRELOC=no)-1 ]   |        fi; \
[CI Build/Linux Build (BINRELOC=no)-1 ]   |      } | grep -v 'libtool:' >/dev/null; then \
[CI Build/Linux Build (BINRELOC=no)-1 ]   |      package_gnu=yes; \
[CI Build/Linux Build (BINRELOC=no)-1 ]   |    else \
[CI Build/Linux Build (BINRELOC=no)-1 ]   |      package_gnu=no; \
[CI Build/Linux Build (BINRELOC=no)-1 ]   |    fi; \
